message:
fix(cli,db,server,storage): cross-project message isolation, multi-addr health check, batch tracking

CLI (mcp-agent-mail-cli/lib.rs):
- Add ensure_message_in_project() guard to reply path, preventing
  agents from replying to messages belonging to other projects (closes
  a cross-project information leak where message IDs are global)
- Add unit tests for project boundary enforcement

Search scope (mcp-agent-mail-db/search_scope.rs):
- Replace has_approved_contact_in_project() with has_approved_contact()
  to enforce exact sender-level contact matching instead of allowing any
  approved contact within the same project to grant visibility — this
  tightens cross-project search scope to require per-agent approval
- Add test: cross_project_denied_with_only_unrelated_project_contact
- Fix whitespace alignment in test assertions

Server (mcp-agent-mail-server):
- lib.rs: Increase BEST_EFFORT_SYNC_DB_BUSY_TIMEOUT_MS from 250ms to
  5000ms to prevent chronic "counts present, detail rows missing" TUI
  snapshots during short-lived writer bursts
- startup_checks.rs: Refactor health check to try all resolved addresses
  (is_agent_mail_health_check_addrs) instead of only the first, fixing
  connectivity checks on hosts with multiple A/AAAA records; add test
  proving fallback to second address when first is dead
- tui_widgets.rs: Simplify MetricTile label color from lerp_color blend
  to direct text_secondary for cleaner visual consistency

Storage (mcp-agent-mail-storage/lib.rs):
- Fix coalescer_commit_batch() to report committed_requests/commits
  from the actual committed count instead of total batch size, which
  was overcounting on partial failures
- Add test: coalescer_commit_batch_tracks_partial_sequential_success_counts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
